				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-77810c7 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="77810c7" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
									<p><span class="a_GcMg font-feature-liga-off font-feature-clig-off font-feature-calt-off text-decoration-none text-strikethrough-none">Say goodbye to hidden contaminants</span> <span class="a_GcMg font-feature-liga-off font-feature-clig-off font-feature-calt-off text-decoration-none text-strikethrough-none">in your water and hello to safe, great-tasting hydration for the whole family with HW800 AlkaPro. This smart, tankless Reverse Osmosis (R.O.) system from Honest Water Co.—trusted for years in Dallas, Texas—makes it easy to enjoy clean, refreshing water straight from your tap. Built for everyday convenience and using the latest technology, HW800 AlkaPro keeps your water healthy and delicious while being kind to the environment.</span></p>								</div>

									<p>Designed to capture dirt, sand, rust, and sediment before they enter your home, this pre-sediment filter protects plumbing and downstream filtration systems. It helps maintain cleaner water flow and extends the life of your whole-home water treatment system.</p>								</div>

						<details id="e-n-accordion-item-1010" class="e-n-accordion-item" open="">
				<summary class="e-n-accordion-item-title" data-accordion-index="1" tabindex="0" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="e-n-accordion-item-1010">
					<span class="e-n-accordion-item-title-header"><div class="e-n-accordion-item-title-text"> What is a whole-home water filtration system? </div></span>
							<span class="e-n-accordion-item-title-icon">
			<span class="e-opened"><svg aria-hidden="true" class="e-font-icon-svg e-fas-minus" viewBox="0 0 448 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M416 208H32c-17.67 0-32 14.33-32 32v32c0 17.67 14.33 32 32 32h384c17.67 0 32-14.33 32-32v-32c0-17.67-14.33-32-32-32z"></path></svg></span>
			<span class="e-closed"><svg aria-hidden="true" class="e-font-icon-svg e-fas-plus" viewBox="0 0 448 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M416 208H272V64c0-17.67-14.33-32-32-32h-32c-17.67 0-32 14.33-32 32v144H32c-17.67 0-32 14.33-32 32v32c0 17.67 14.33 32 32 32h144v144c0 17.67 14.33 32 32 32h32c17.67 0 32-14.33 32-32V304h144c17.67 0 32-14.33 32-32v-32c0-17.67-14.33-32-32-32z"></path></svg></span>
		</span>

						</summary>
				<div role="region" aria-labelledby="e-n-accordion-item-1010" class="elementor-element elementor-element-c8f83b6 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="c8f83b6" data-element_type="container">
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-f19a0b8 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="f19a0b8" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
									<p>A whole-home water filtration system filters the water at the main point of entry, ensuring clean, filtered water is available throughout your entire home for drinking, cooking, bathing, and cleaning.</p>								</div>
				</div>
					</details>
						<details id="e-n-accordion-item-1011" class="e-n-accordion-item">
				<summary class="e-n-accordion-item-title" data-accordion-index="2" tabindex="-1" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="e-n-accordion-item-1011">
					<span class="e-n-accordion-item-title-header"><div class="e-n-accordion-item-title-text"> How does reverse osmosis work? </div></span>
							<span class="e-n-accordion-item-title-icon">
			<span class="e-opened"><svg aria-hidden="true" class="e-font-icon-svg e-fas-minus" viewBox="0 0 448 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M416 208H32c-17.67 0-32 14.33-32 32v32c0 17.67 14.33 32 32 32h384c17.67 0 32-14.33 32-32v-32c0-17.67-14.33-32-32-32z"></path></svg></span>
			<span class="e-closed"><svg aria-hidden="true" class="e-font-icon-svg e-fas-plus" viewBox="0 0 448 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M416 208H272V64c0-17.67-14.33-32-32-32h-32c-17.67 0-32 14.33-32 32v144H32c-17.67 0-32 14.33-32 32v32c0 17.67 14.33 32 32 32h144v144c0 17.67 14.33 32 32 32h32c17.67 0 32-14.33 32-32V304h144c17.67 0 32-14.33 32-32v-32c0-17.67-14.33-32-32-32z"></path></svg></span>
		</span>

						</summary>
				<div role="region" aria-labelledby="e-n-accordion-item-1011" class="elementor-element elementor-element-38d6332 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="38d6332" data-element_type="container">
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-afc3b3d elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="afc3b3d" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
									Reverse osmosis (RO) works by pushing water through a semipermeable membrane that removes contaminants like chlorine, heavy metals, and other impurities, providing purified water for drinking and cooking.								</div>
				</div>
					</details>
						<details id="e-n-accordion-item-1012" class="e-n-accordion-item">
				<summary class="e-n-accordion-item-title" data-accordion-index="3" tabindex="-1" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="e-n-accordion-item-1012">
					<span class="e-n-accordion-item-title-header"><div class="e-n-accordion-item-title-text"> How often should I replace the filters? </div></span>
							<span class="e-n-accordion-item-title-icon">
			<span class="e-opened"><svg aria-hidden="true" class="e-font-icon-svg e-fas-minus" viewBox="0 0 448 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M416 208H32c-17.67 0-32 14.33-32 32v32c0 17.67 14.33 32 32 32h384c17.67 0 32-14.33 32-32v-32c0-17.67-14.33-32-32-32z"></path></svg></span>

		</span>

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>
